tooltip_take_damage: External effect (any time). Damage minus Toughness = margin.
tooltip_margin: Damage minus Toughness. 0 = Shaken only. Every full 4 = one wound (raise).
tooltip_soak: Wounds negated by spending a Benny + Vigor roll. Each success/raise removes 1 wound. If all wounds soaked, also clears Shaken.
tooltip_incap_roll: Vigor roll at the moment of becoming incapacitated. Only used if this hit pushes wounds past max. -1 = crit fail (dead). 0 = fail (bleeding out). 1+ = success (stable with injury).
tooltip_injury_roll: Injury Table roll: tableRoll*10 + subRoll. E.g. 52 = table 5, sub 2. Only used on incapacitation. 0 = no injury.
tooltip_start_of_turn: Start of character's turn. Automatic free checks: Vigor (stunned, bleeding out), Spirit (shaken).
tooltip_vigor_roll: Vigor check result. Used for Stunned recovery and Bleeding Out. 0 = fail. 1 = success. 2+ = raise.
tooltip_spirit_roll: Spirit check result. Used for Shaken recovery. 0 = fail. 1 = success. 2+ = raise.
tooltip_spend_benny: Spend a Benny to immediately remove Shaken (any time, even on others' turns).
tooltip_defend: Full Defense: +4 Parry. Uses whole turn — no multi-actions. Can move at Pace, no running. Lasts until start of next turn.
tooltip_on_hold: On Hold. Act voluntarily or interrupt another's action.
tooltip_act_from_hold: Voluntarily leave hold and take your turn (no Athletics check needed).
tooltip_interrupt: Reaction (on hold). Opposed Athletics check to interrupt another's action.
tooltip_athletics_roll: Athletics roll to interrupt. 0 = fail (act after interruptee). 1+ = success (act before interruptee).
tooltip_escape_attempt: Action (on your turn). Strength (-2) or Athletics check.
tooltip_escape_roll: Escape roll. From entangled: 1+ = free. From bound: 1 = entangled, 2+ = free.
tooltip_grapple: Action (on your turn). Opposed Athletics check. Escape is also an action.
tooltip_heal: Action (on your turn). Healing skill (within Golden Hour) or natural healing.
tooltip_heal_amount: Number of wounds healed (1-3). Healing while incapacitated also removes incapacitation.
tooltip_fear_check: Free action (any time). Spirit check when encountering a source of fear.
tooltip_fear_modifier: Modifier to Fear Table roll (e.g. +2 for Terror).
tooltip_affliction: External effect (poisons, diseases, powers). Effects applied at start of character's turn.
tooltip_affliction_duration: Number of turns the affliction lasts.
tooltip_power_effects: Action (on your turn). Power activation; duration in rounds. Backlash removes all effects + fatigue.
tooltip_power_duration: Number of rounds the effect lasts.
tooltip_penalty: Cumulative penalty to all trait rolls from Wounds (max -3) and Fatigue levels.
tooltip_defending: Full Defense: +4 Parry, uses whole turn, lasts until next turn
tooltip_injury_penalty: Number of die-reducing injuries (Guts/Head Brain Damage)
affliction_weak: Weak (+1 fatigue at start of turn)
affliction_lethal: Lethal (+fatigue, shaken, wound at start of turn)
log_tooltip_undo: Undo — roll back to previous event
log_tooltip_clear: Clear log and reset to fresh state
tooltip_stable: Incapacitated with injury. Injury Table roll not modeled — lookup is external.
tooltip_bleeding_out: Dying. Vigor roll each turn: fail = dead, raise = stabilized. Injury Table roll not modeled.
status_shaken_effects: Free actions and movement only. Parry unaffected.
status_shaken_removal: Spirit check at start of turn. Benny = instant.
status_stunned_effects: Distracted and Vulnerable. Falls prone. Cannot act.
status_stunned_removal: Vigor at start of turn. Success = Vulnerable until end of next turn.
status_distracted_cause: Tests, magic, creature abilities; side effect of Stunned.
status_distracted_removal: At the end of your next turn.
status_vulnerable_cause: Tests, magic, creature abilities; side effect of Stunned.
status_vulnerable_effects: Enemies get +2 to all rolls against the character.
status_vulnerable_removal: At the end of your next turn.
status_wounded_cause: Each raise on the damage roll (every 4 over Toughness).
status_wounded_effects: -1 per wound (max -3) to trait rolls and Pace.
status_wounded_removal: Healing (within Golden Hour) or natural healing (5 days).
status_incapacitated_cause: Wounds exceed max; fatigue past Exhausted.
status_incapacitated_effects: Cannot act. May be bleeding out (Vigor check each turn).
status_fatigued_cause: Hazards, stress, arcane powers, hunger, thirst.
status_fatigued_removal: One hour of rest (or remove cause).
status_exhausted_cause: Fatigued character gains another fatigue level.
status_exhausted_removal: One hour of rest (or remove cause).
status_prone_effects: Ranged attacks -4 (from 3+ inches). Melee: -2 Fighting, -2 Parry.
status_on_hold_cause: Character chooses to wait, not acting on their turn.
status_on_hold_removal: Using turn / interrupting. Shaken or Stunned removes it.
status_bound_effects: Cannot move. Distracted and Vulnerable. Can only attempt escape.
status_grabbed_cause: Success on opposed Athletics during grapple.
status_pinned_cause: Raise on grapple; repeated grapple on grabbed target.
status_pinned_effects: Cannot move. Distracted and Vulnerable. Can only attempt escape.
status_blinded_effects: Impaired (-2) or Blinded (-4) to all sight-related rolls.
status_blinded_removal: Vigor at start of turn: raise = remove, success = reduce by one step.
status_defending_cause: Voluntarily: character spends whole turn defending.
status_defending_effects: +4 to Parry. Can move (Pace) but cannot run.
status_defending_removal: Automatically at start of next turn.
